title: <div>And also the message from Paul at the beginning of Houdini makes so much mo
content:
And also the message from Paul at the beginning of Houdini makes so much more sense now too lol

D:
Haha true

A:
His rhymes about being overweight, I don't know a little too much for me, but it's
Funny 😆

D:
Haha definitely. I read those to be more about society embracing obesity tho
And how it’s not necessarily healthy to do that lol
His deaf voice had me dying too
I forget which track

A:
Oh for sure. Just funny to be using some of that language in rhymes
Like diabetes
Lmao
I gotta pull it up. I mean, it's masterful
He is just so masterful

D:
For sure. Dude started with pure talent and spent the last 30+ years doing nothing but honing it

A:
Entropy! Another word for eventually
So dope
Just really heard that for the first time

D
Haha thanks man. I’m really proud of a lot of my writing on that album
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 8 (chunk 8/10)
